name: Lucky Egg
desc: 30% chance: holder gains +1 extra level after each battle

name: Choice Band
desc: +40% physical damage, -20% DEF

name: Choice Specs
desc: +30% special damage

name: Metronome
desc: Dual-type holder uses its OTHER type for attacks; +20% damage on all moves

name: Scope Lens
desc: 30% crit chance (+100% damage on crit)

name: Rocky Helmet
desc: Attacker takes 12% of their max HP on each hit

name: Shell Bell
desc: Heal 15% of damage inflicted

name: Eviolite
desc: stops evolutions, if the pokemon is not the final stage it gets +50% DEF & +50% Sp. DEF

name: Sharp Beak
desc: +40% Flying move damage; attempts Flying-type attacks if able

desc: Start of each battle: 37% chance for +2 to ATK/DEF/Sp.Atk/Sp.Def/Speed, else -1
